description: You are a Lean Manufacturing Consultant tasked with completing a current-state Value Stream Map (VSM) for the 'Stamping' product family and designing a future-state map. Using the incomplete diagram in '~/Diagrams/stamping_vsm.drawio' and the data provided in '~/Desktop/vsm_data_sheet.txt', complete the current-state map by adding the remaining process steps (Welding II, Assembly I, Assembly II, and Shipping), data boxes with values from the data sheet, inventory triangles, and a lead time ladder calculating total lead time and processing time. Ensure information flow arrows connect Production Control to the Supplier and all processes. On a new page named 'Future State', design an improved flow that combines Welding I and II into a 'Weld Cell', combines Assembly I and II into an 'Assembly Cell', incorporates a 'Supermarket' between Stamping and the Weld Cell, uses a 'FIFO' lane between the Weld and Assembly cells, and includes 'Kaizen' bursts for identified improvements. Export the final multi-page diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/stamping_vsm.pdf'.
